summary.key_theme: Palantir 透過 AIPCon 10 大會展示強勁的 AI 商業生態擴張，並與 Google Cloud 達成重大策略合作，獲得分析師高度看好。

bullish.title: Palantir Announces Availability on Google Cloud Marketplace, Including Two-Way Integrations between BigQuery and Foundry and Deep Connectivity between Gemini and AIP
bullish.reason: 與 Google Cloud 的深度整合將顯著擴大 Palantir 的企業客戶觸及範圍，並透過 Gemini AI 工具增強其 AIP 平台競爭力。

bullish.title: Wedbush Reiterates Outperform on Palantir Technologies, Maintains $230 Price Target
bullish.reason: Wedbush 分析師 Dan Ives 維持買入評級與高目標價，顯示華爾街對其在 AI 革命中的領先地位具備高度信心。

bullish.title: Palantir Signs AI Platform Agreements With Kirkland & Ellis, McCarthy Building, GNP Seguros
bullish.reason: 成功簽署多項跨產業（法律、建築、保險）合約，證明其 AIP 平台在不同垂直領域的強大適應性與商業變現能力。

bullish.title: Palantir Technologies Expanding AI Use Cases Strengthen Competitive Position, Wedbush Says
bullish.reason: Wedbush 指出 Palantir 正處於 AI 革命的「黃金路徑」，持續擴展的應用場景進一步鞏固了其市場護城河。

bullish.title: Palantir Customers Reveal How AI Amplifies Their Tradecraft at AIPCon 10
bullish.reason: 透過 AIPCon 10 大會展示客戶實際應用案例，有效增強市場對其技術落地能力的信心。

bearish.title: Palantir faces fresh skepticism from Michael Burry — PLTR Tests Investor Patience Near Key Resistance Zone
bearish.reason: 知名投資人 Michael Burry 的質疑帶來負面情緒，且股價面臨關鍵技術阻力位，可能引發短期獲利了結賣壓。

bearish.title: Is It Time To Reconsider Palantir Technologies (PLTR) After Recent Volatility And Rich Earnings Multiple
bearish.reason: 市場對其高昂的本益比（Earnings Multiple）提出估值過高的擔憂，提醒投資人注意股價波動風險。

neutral.title: ServiceNow vs Palantir: Which Enterprise AI Stock Belongs in a Retirement Portfolio?
neutral.reason: 僅為產業競爭對手的比較分析，未提供具體利多或利空消息，對股價影響中性。

neutral.title: Nasdaq, S&P 500 Futures Take A Breather Ahead Of ADP Jobs Data: Why PANW, AVGO, CRWD, PLTR, ASTC, GME, XOS Are In Focus
neutral.reason: 僅提及 PLTR 為市場焦點個股，主要受總體經濟數據發布前的市場觀望情緒影響。
